exercises.name: Plate Loaded Bench Press
exercises.notes: RESET to 72.5kg. Last A was 75x5,5,5,4 @RPE10 grind (last set dropped, pre-fatigued shoulders). Progress ONLY when last set is RPE<=7 - never grind at RPE10. Own this weight clean first.

exercises.name: DB Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Was 17.5x10,10,8 @RPE10 - hold. Shoulders fade fast (your note last time). Bench is lighter today (72.5) so they should be fresher - aim 10 across.

exercises.name: Leg Press 45
exercises.notes: Was 145x12,10,10 @RPE10 - hold. Partial ROM, knee-friendly. Get 10 clean across before adding load.

exercises.name: Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Was 7.5x10,10,10 @RPE9 - hold weight, push to 12. Strict, no swing, lead with elbows.

exercises.name: Cable Crunch
exercises.notes: Was 70x15,15,15 @RPE7 - +2.5kg (easy last time). Kneeling, facing the stack, crunch with abs not hip flexors.

exercises.name: Reverse Curl
exercises.notes: Was 26x10,10,10 @RPE10 - hold. Forearms/biceps. Strict, no swing.

exercises.name: Pec Deck Fly (drop set)
exercises.notes: ONE triple-drop set, no rest between drops. Start 40kg to failure (hit 12 last time) -> drop ~33kg to failure -> drop ~26kg to failure. Chest finisher.
